title: Mulled Wine
summary: This mulled wine ticks all the boxes. Fragrant, sweet and gently spiced for a real wintery treat.

method.description: Lightly toast the cinnamon stick, cloves and star anise in a saucepan until aromatic, be careful not to burn.
Cut the orange in half and squeeze in the juice then add the whole orange. Pour in the red wine and add the sugar.
Stir well until the sugar dissolves. Warm until the wine just starts to gently bubble, then turn off the heat and allow to infuse for 15 mins.
Pass through a strainer to remove the spices.
Simply add the mulled wine into little individual bags or tubs of your choice. Warm gently before serving and enjoy.

chefs.name: Jordon Ezra King
chefs.summary: Jordon Ezra King is a chef and storyteller. Having cooked, temped, and staged his way through a host of kitchens around the world, Jordon has now set his sights on sharing his knowledge with the world, using his platform to teach people how to work their way around a kitchen and educate them about the provenance of the dishes they're cooking while he does it.
